programme.desc: Rollins clashes with the parents of a teenaged runaway. The squad comes together for a special event.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: The execution-style murder of a Fountain Valley wife and mother shocks the OC, and leaves police with no leads on motive. The community bands together to find justice until a similar shooting reveals the truth behind a murder plot gone awry.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Ambush
programme.desc: While Hetty is attending a Senate hearing in D.C., the investigation of a murdered Marine Lance Corporal leads the team to stolen anti-tank missiles and a dangerous militia group.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Air
programme.desc: The team uncovers a sinister plan when a controversial DJ and a naval officer are shot to death.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice

programme.title: Movie: The Nightmare Before Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Minions

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Former villain Gru reconnects with his long-lost and far more successful twin brother Dru for one last heist: stealing a diamond from another supervillain, former child star Balthazar Bratt who is obsessed with the character that he played in his youth.

programme.desc: A wily con artist and a rookie cop work together to unravel a mysterious conspiracy.

programme.desc: Single mom Maggie is facing Christmas alone until Lucas crashes into her life and becomes an unexpected houseguest. Together they overcome Christmas while finding comfort in their growing bond.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Love You Like Christmas
programme.desc: A high-powered marketing executive on her way to a wedding is derailed by car trouble. A fork in the road leads her to Christmas Valley, and her unexpected journey leaves her wondering what her life has been missing.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic who can't seem to give a guy a real chance begins receiving '12 Days of Christmas' gifts anonymously at door. She begins to believe that the mystery suitor could live up to her expectations.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Love
programme.desc: A CEO sends his son to learn about their bakery business at their flagship store in advance of him taking over the company. He learns the ropes from the local baker and the more time they spend together, the closer they get.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.desc: An unprecedented new chapter kicks off on the homestead as the Kilchers film themselves coping with Alaska's stay-at-home order amid a growing pandemic. Resources must be stretched, homeschooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.desc: An unprecedented new chapter kicks off on the homestead as the Kilchers film themselves coping with Alaska's stay-at-home order amid a growing pandemic. Resources must be stretched, homeschooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.desc: As supply chains in Alaska are disrupted, Jane and Eve focus on maximizing food supplies. The cattle drive is threatened by a runaway stallion, Eivin suffers a serious injury in his workshop and Atz Sr requires emergency surgery.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Great Kilcher Quake
programme.desc: A massive earthquake hits Southern Alaska and the Kilcher family scrambles to recover. They fight to re-open vital access roads. Atz Lee races towards his dream of a new remote homestead to aid in recovery, creating waves with his wife, Jane.

programme.desc: Mother Nature continues her onslaught on the Kilcher homestead, using a variety of weapons. Otto, Charlotte, Jane, Bonnie, and August scramble to save a hay barn. Atz Lee and Sr. begin building Atz Lee's new cabin.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Fired Up About a '67 Chevelle
programme.desc: 'Fired Up Garage' goes to work on a '67 Chevelle. The team also enters a demolition derby for publicity, running into former co-workers of the shop they were all fired from by Richard Rawlings and who they later find out is their new shop landlord.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Fired Up About a '67 Chevelle, Part II
programme.desc: The garage struggles to deal with Richard, as well as the completion of their first major build. The '67 Chevelle could put the Fired Up Garage on the map, and make them competitors of Richard and the Gas Monkey Garage.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Whatever It Takes: Part 1
programme.desc: The racers head to Route 66 Raceway in Illinois for the fifth event of the season. Lizzy and Team NOLA now has three straight wins under their belt so the competition is prepared to do anything to get ahead -- even if it involves fighting.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Game On
programme.desc: Team NOLA is seeking revenge as the racers move into the second round at Route 66 Raceway. Ryan is ready to fight to keep his points lead but Disco Dean, Axman and the Outcasts are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Turbo Trouble
programme.desc: The racers battle thin air and an aggressive points race at mile-high Bandimere Speedway in Colorado. The Rocky Mountain air proves to be a challenge for Ryan and the other turbo racers, but Kye, Lizzy and other nitrous users are ready to capitalize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Ruler of the Mountain
programme.desc: Conditions remain unforgiving as the racers move into round two at Colorado's Bandimere Speedway. With so much on the line, even those who are struggling will stop at nothing to win and be crowned King or Queen of the Mountain.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Texas' Last Stand
programme.desc: The points races has heated up to an all-time high and the racers are willing to do anything to get ahead. Ryan still leads in points but Lizzy and Kye are hot on his heels.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round 2 hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Only two races remain and the points championship is coming down to the wire. Ryan feels the pressure as Team NOLA's racers pull out all the stops. Team Texas makes a surprise alliance and the Outcasts are poised to strike back.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: It Ain't Over Yet
programme.desc: Round two of the seventh race begins. Team NOLA's strategy in round one didn't pan out, but they still have a chance to impact the points standings if leaders draw one of their names.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Don't Choke
programme.desc: Ryan rolls into the final event at the top of the leaderboard and with each round worth double points, the pressure is on to not let the elusive NPK trophy slip away for a third time. Kye, Lizzy and Scott do everything in their power to derail him.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Do or Die

programme.desc: DNA evidence found on a murder victim leads to the arrest of Houston's notorious 'tourniquet killer;' after a young woman is found shot and burned in California, investigators spend years trying to pin the rap on the woman's boyfriend and his cousin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Man in the Shadows/ The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A DNA hit sends an ex-convict back to prison; a hitchhiker is murdered in California.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killer on Campus/ The Bow Hunter
programme.desc: In 1969, a first-year law student is found shot twice in the head with nylon stockings wrapped around her neck, but police are unable to find the killer until they get a hand from DNA evidence 31 years later. A man confesses to killing a hunter.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Secret
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Learn who was the most excited to film at Universal Studios and why the guys decided against posing as security guards. Plus, take a look at the exciting costumes the guys originally planned for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Evaluation Session
programme.desc: The Interns of the NSA suffer through their worst fear: a randomized evaluation test administered by the mysterious higher-ups.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: A Model Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Lee pieces back together her patient’s stretched out and torn earlobes, Dr. Cat helps a plus size model who wants her excess skin removed and a southern belle hopes Dr. Q can help her stop sweating excessively due to her hyperhidrosis.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Summer Body
programme.desc: Dr. Q takes on a risky two-part surgery on a man who underwent a massive weight loss, a woman with pectus excavatum comes to Dr. Kelly to mask her deformity and a patient consults with Dr. Cat about getting dimples added to her face.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: The Lift that keeps on Giving
programme.desc: Dr. Lee helps a 60-year-old woman look as young as she feels with a facelift, Dr. Cat gives a WAG her booty back and Dr. Q restores her husband’s hair.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Facing Your Fears
programme.desc: Dr. Q is shocked to see a baseball-sized cyst on her patient’s face, a 31-year-old yoga instructor recently discovers she has the BRCA gene and goes to Dr. Killeen for a straight to implant double mastectomy.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Artistry
programme.desc: The holidays are a time for artistry and decorations, so for the pre-heat, inflatable holiday decorations inspire the six bakers' cute cream puff displays. In the main heat, the bakers dazzle the judges with delicious hand-painted eggnog cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Light and Inspiring
programme.desc: The Festival of Lights ignites creativity in the pre-heat, when the five bakers have to update traditional rugelach with unexpected new flavors like cardamom, grapefruit, guava paste, peanut butter or chai.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: New Family Classics
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers are going cocoa-loco for the holiday season in the chocolaty pre-heat, when they have to combine common pantry ingredients like balsamic vinegar, potato chips, oatmeal, red wine, olive oil and more.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gifts Of Greatness
programme.desc: Three bakers remain in the competition, and in the pre-heat, they have to create a beautiful edible holiday ornament display. For the final main heat, the bakers channel holiday gift shopping by creating a cake that is decorated like a gift.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Santa to the Rescue!
programme.desc: For one magical night, Santa Claus is a hero to all the world's kids. Host Raven-Symone challenges the five teams of cake and sugar artists to imagine what happens outside of the North Pole when Santa steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Season's Sweetings
programme.desc: Five fan-favorite kid bakers compete to win a $10,000 baker's dream package that includes a blast chiller! Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman serve as hosts, mentors and judges as they challenge the bakers to create festive gingerbread house cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Festive Bread Wreaths
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer kicks off the competition for 12 bakers with holiday decorated quick bread wreaths. In the main heat, the competitors must make a winter hat cake to charm the judges.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fall for Your Pantry

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Clank, Clank, Drunken Skank
programme.desc: Walden starts partying with Jenny and her hot friends. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey’s illicit affair is jeopardized.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Baseball. Boobs. Boobs. Baseball.
programme.desc: Alan lets Lyndsey's boyfriend Larry set him up on a date. Meanwhile, Walden offers to help Nicole with her software project so she'll have time to date him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cab Fare and a Bottle of Pencillin

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose in the City
programme.desc: A team is deployed to relocate a moose that has found its way into the city. During an undercover mission, Officer Egan encounters multiple violating bird hunters, while Officer Canfield rushes to rescue an injured hiker trapped on Mount Carrigain.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose in the City
programme.desc: A team is deployed to relocate a moose that has found its way into the city. During an undercover mission, Officer Egan encounters multiple violating bird hunters, while Officer Canfield rushes to rescue an injured hiker trapped on Mount Carrigain.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Deer Detectives
programme.desc: Maine's busy deer hunting season keeps the wardens on their toes. An intentional violator in Aroostook County is busted night hunting. A hunter misidentifies his target and shoots an antlerless deer and feuding neighbors hamper the wardens' investigation.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed
programme.desc: A look back at the most exciting moments of the season, as well as behind-the-scenes footage of what it takes to make a show about the Maine game wardens.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Ice Out
programme.desc: The Maine wardens search under the ice of a frozen lake for the victims of the worst snowmobile accident in recent history.

programme.title: Animal Impossible: Bears
programme.desc: Revealing the truth behind incredible myths surrounding the animal kingdom. Discover the best defense mechanism against a bear attack.

programme.title: Animal Impossible: Bulls
programme.desc: Discover if bulls are truly riled up by the colour red.

programme.title: Animal Impossible: Spiders
programme.desc: Revealing the truth behind incredible myths surrounding the animal kingdom. Discover whether or not a spider's silk is stronger than steel.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Big Bad Bonefish
programme.desc: Lake Windsor on Inagua Island is home to a mystery. How did giant ocean-dwelling fish get into a lake with no natural inlet or outlet? The Fish or Die team journeys to the tropics to investigate the mystery and hopefully catch some world-class bonefish.

programme.title: Fish or Die: The Four Norsemen
programme.desc: The team follows a lead to an extremely remote river in Greenland, believed to hold massive Arctic char. With its barren tundra, towering fjords, and ice-carved valleys, they discover Greenland is wilderness at its most pure and most dangerous.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Pirates of Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Off the extreme eastern tip of Papua New Guinea lies Milne Bay. It's rumored to be home to huge schools of one of the greatest sportfish ever, the giant trevally. Trying to hook and land a giant trevally on a fly rod will be the ultimate test.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Lair of the River Wolf
programme.desc: The crew travels to Mongolia in search of taimen: the largest, most ferocious member of the salmon family. Reaching their target will involve a punishing combination of back-breaking mountain trails, treacherous rivers and uncooperative Mongolian horses.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Eye of the Tigerfish
programme.desc: The guys head deep into Zambia, chasing reports of large tigerfish - a fierce freshwater predator - in an uncharted river. The only thing standing in their way is 400 miles of unpaved roads, crocodiles, hippos and a serious lack of fuel.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four friends begin a challenging jungle expedition in search of a giant golden dorado, possibly dwelling within a remote Bolivian river. To find their way there, they must conquer torrential rains, vicious insects and isolated tribes.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Megaquake
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Pyramid of the Americas
programme.desc: At an ancient city lost in the desert for 5,000 years, experts uncover evidence of human sacrifice and strange rituals, and new discoveries reveal that the people who lived here might have been the first civilization of the Americas.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Doomsday Mummies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Black Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Black Pyramid is the strange, crumbling pyramid that collapsed before its pharaoh was ever buried here, and today, it's largely unexplored. Special access to a hi-tech archaeological investigation reveals what went so catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: American Monster: Looks Can Kill
programme.desc: When mysterious and beautiful Rebecca Thudin meets the dashing Larry Fenton, a whirlwind romance is sparked. The rich, successful pair seem to be a match made in heaven, until a murder exposes a tangled web of lies, deceit and buried secrets.

programme.title: American Monster: Have You Seen This Woman?
programme.desc: Rebecca and Ken Pierce film themselves raising their four kids in idyllic rural Oklahoma. But the family is haunted by a specter of addiction and violence across generations that will leave two of them brutally murdered, and the family destroyed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Girl in the Lake
programme.desc: In 1987, 11-year-old Teresa McAbee goes missing near her home in Mascotte, Florida. When her body is found the next morning, James Duckett, the only police officer on duty in town, comes under suspicion for her murder. But not everyone thinks he's guilty.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mommy's Little Helpers

programme.title: Twisted Love: Hell to Pay

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love is Relative

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: A Strange Trust
programme.desc: When 16-year-old BFFs Dawn Donaldson and Crissy Campbell vanish overnight, the residents of Grass Valley, California, fear for their children's safety. Rumors fly, from runaways to abduction. Detectives must find them before their worst fears come true.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Dead End
programme.desc: When a ten year-old boy makes a quick run to the store, he runs into a nightmare instead. A strange slew of suspect's pops out of the woodwork, but when police zero in on the bad guy, his motive is more shocking than anyone can imagine.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Murder in the Night
programme.desc: A triple murder leaves three members of a family dead, residents of Lancaster, Pennsylvania are shaken to their cores. With few clues at the crime scene, the search leads detectives on a wild goose chase. Police finally learn the killer's name.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Lies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered, her case goes unsolved for a year. A fortuitous arrest brings with it a new prime suspect, but an explosive confession of forbidden love causes everyone close to the case to reevaluate all they know.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: History of Violence
programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Overhaul
programme.desc: Continuing her restoration of Adam and Rachael's home, Nicole moves her attention to the living room, where she must restore the beat up hardwood floors.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Tile Terrors
programme.desc: Turning her attention to Adam and Rachael's bathroom, Nicole deals with the many problems that creep up while working with tile in an old house. When she hits a snag, she must figure out a way to make her fixtures fit in the small space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Calamity
programme.desc: Nicole is hired by one of her clients to rehab his cluttered, compact kitchen into a useable, restored space for his family.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Beautification
programme.desc: Nicole takes on another design project while waiting for the Minnehaha house to sell. This time it's her client's colourful sea themed bathroom that needs fixing.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Mantle to Remember
programme.desc: Restoring the first floor of the Dollar House continues as host and designer Nicole Curtis uncovers hardwood floors throughout the living and dining room areas. The dining room hutch is still intact, but there is a whole new fireplace mantle to build.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Faulty Foundation
programme.desc: A bachelor's dark dining and living room are opened up and become one modern lounge. What was once dirty-carpeted living room with college dorm furniture and a separate ugly dining room gets completely transformed into one hip wine room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Bartello Job
programme.desc: Paula is known as a great hostess, but doesn't have the modern kitchen to match. So she's enlisted her friend Julie's help give it the face-lift it needs.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Simmons Job
programme.desc: Gina and Joey want to turn their junky attic into a new master bedroom and bathroom. Even though they have renovated most of their house together, this project quickly turns into a battlefield.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Etjeke Job
programme.desc: Erica and Jean Etjeke love their beach bungalow but hate their outdated, cramped kitchen and several obstacles threaten to derail their plans for a new dream kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Partch Job
programme.desc: Kat and Ron Partch want to open up their tiny kitchen to create an open space for entertaining their friends. But, as they demolish their walls and ceilings, they run into electrical and structural problems.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Ratliff Job
programme.desc: Chris and Laura Ratliff's kitchen is falling apart, so they have decided to tear it all out and start from scratch. But from the word go, everything starts going terribly wrong.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Kline Job
programme.desc: Lindsay Kline and her boyfriend Matt Dixon want to turn their disgusting backyard into a hip outdoor space. Even though Matt's a landscaper this renovation has plenty of obstacles.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Pleuss Job
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jim and Ally Pleuss want to open up the living and dining room space in their new house by tearing out the walls around the staircase.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The True Job
programme.desc: Sidney True and his girlfriend Jessica O'Brien want to give their 1970's kitchen a complete facelift. They plan to start from scratch and think it's going to be easy but a furry friend, time delay and unexpected damage gives them a reality check.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off a full day of Thanksgiving eats, including homemade pies and irresistible sides. And don't forget the turkey! These top picks for the big day will leave you feeling ready to feast.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine

programme.desc: Grammy award-winning artist Peter Frampton to share his new memoir, ‘Do You Feel Like I Do: A Memoir.'

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Evergreen: Letters to Santa
programme.desc: A woman returns to her home town for Christmas and discovers that the town's historic general store has shut down. Using the skills she has as a retail designer, she is determined to bring the store back to life in time for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Michael gets kicked out of a bar while trying to impress one of Jim's friends.

programme.title: The Office: Secretary's Day
programme.desc: Andy pulls out all the stops to give Erin a memorable Secretary's Day, and Michael reluctantly agrees to take her out to lunch. While out, Michael accidentally reveals a secret about Andy and Angela's relationship.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.title: Movie: Dear Secret Santa
programme.desc: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman moves back into the house she grew up in, brining back memories of the boy next door who recently passed away. One day she receives a Christmas card from a secret admirer she believes to be the same boy.

programme.title: Movie: All About Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A party planner has to decide between a romantic vacation and the biggest event of her career.

programme.title: Movie: Always and Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A woman inherits a year-round Christmas store in a small town.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: CNN Films: Whitey: The United States of America vs. James J. Bulger
Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber
programme.desc: Writing style reveals Unabomber's identity when Ted Kaczynski's sister-in-law recognizes his phrasing in his manifesto.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Cali Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams Texas and California face off in the second matchup of the Wildcard Round and neither are pulling any punches! Texas wants to prove their early loss last season was a fluke while Cali's fresh faces are dead-set on making a big first impression.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Cali Pt 2
programme.desc: As the matchup between Texas and Cali continues, Birdman, Murillo and Team Texas look stronger than ever. But Boddie and his racers from Cali will not be counted out, and if anyone can lead a team back from behind, it's racing legend Boddie.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Kentucky vs Wyoming Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams Kentucky and Wyoming are ready to face off in the third matchup of the Wildcard Round, and though Kentucky appears to be the underdog, they aren't laying down for anyone. They'll use any and every strategy to get an edge over the competition.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Kentucky vs Wyoming Pt 2
Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Iowa vs Utah Pt 1

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Kentucky vs Wyoming Grudge Night
programme.desc: The racers stick around on the street to set up a fresh batch of grudge races. Kye Kelley struggles to get his tune right on this new road, while Fabian from Texas reminds all the racers of what they put on the line every time they climb into their cars.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Monkey Caretaker
programme.desc: Travelling to South Africa, Mike Rowe meets his match when he attempts to train monkeys to run wild.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alpaca Shearer
programme.desc: Mike joins a team of filthy farmers on their job in at Taylor Shellfish Farms before getting down and dirty in the tropics as he farm taro. Mike also finds out that animals don't like haircuts when he joins a family of alpaca farmers to shear alpacas.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Special Effects Artist
programme.desc: Mike exposes the fascinating secrets behind the dirty world of special effects. He explores this very strange world as special effects artist, Toby Sells, transforms him into a real life zombie. Also, Mike gets dirty harvesting kelp.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Abandoned Mine Plugger
programme.desc: Mike travels to Ohio to check on the Common Tern population and then he finds himself in Northern California plugging an abandoned mineshaft.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Concrete Finisher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Moss Landing, California to learn the art of making decorative concrete countertops and fire pits. He then recounts the scariest jobs he has ever done in his career.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cricket Farmer
programme.desc: Mike heads to Augusta, Georgia to spend the day working on a cricket farm where he helps to breed, capture and package the crickets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Onion Processor
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working as an onion processor, slicing dicing and tasting.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Spider Pharm
programme.desc: Mike ventures to Payette, Idaho to learn how to make high quality bird food. Then he heads s to Yarnell, Arizona to collect spiders from the desert to milk them for their venom.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mardi Gras Bladder Banger
programme.desc: Mike travels to Mobile, Alabama to get a behind-the-scenes look at a Mardi Gras folly float. He spends his day assembling cow bladders that will be used during the parade to drive away evil spirits.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fossil Hunter
programme.desc: Mike travels to a remote area near Moab, Utah, to take on the job of being a paleontologist.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Glass Maker
programme.desc: Mike goes to Jonesboro, Arkansas to perform some research using Dung Beetles, then he heads to Williamstown, West Virginia to try his hand at making some glass art.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rum Distiller
programme.desc: Mike heads to Newport Distillery to help the crew turn molasses into rum. Scouring copper, working with scalding liquid, hauling hoses and lugging molasses cubes are all just part of a hard day's work.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Like Sister, Like Brother
programme.desc: Chantel's older brother returns to Atlanta with his foreign bride. The family welcomes her with open arms, but their speedy marriage sparks Chantel's suspicion. She takes her sister-in-law out to learn more. In the Dominican Republic, Nicole is in love.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A New Family Feud
programme.desc: Chantel's suspicions about Royal's relationship with Angenette grow after talking to Winter and River. As Pedro plans a trip to NYC, Chantel gets big news about her graduation. Sibling secrets come out when tempers flare during a holiday photo shoot.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Ugly Sweaters and Painted Beards
programme.desc: The family photo shoot turns ugly, leaving Chantel and Winter at odds. Pedro and Chantel head to NYC to meet Nicole's boyfriend, Alejandro, and they learn a shocking secret. Karen accompanies Winter to a weight-loss consultation.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Sister Act
programme.desc: Pedro confronts Nicole about dating a married man. As the family prepares to go to the Philippines, Chantel and Winter have an emotional heart-to-heart. Then, things take a shocking turn when Chantel, Karen and Angenette go wedding dress shopping.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back!: Ultimatums and Ugly Truths
programme.desc: Tension runs high when Angela meets Michael's friends. Colt is torn between his mom and his girlfriend. Cultures clash when Andrei's family challenges Elizabeth's role as head of household. Larissa is given an ultimatum and Kalani's dad confronts Asuelu.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A Thrilla in Manila
programme.desc: A shocking secret about Royal and Angenette's relationship surfaces just as the family heads to the Philippines for their wedding. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Nicole braces herself for Lidia's reaction when her new boyfriend comes to visit.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Pillow Talk: A Thrilla in Manila
programme.desc: A shocking secret about Royal and Angenette's relationship surfaces just as the family heads to the Philippines for their wedding. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Nicole braces herself for Lidia's reaction when her new boyfriend comes to visit.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Pillow Talk: A Thrilla in Manila
programme.desc: A shocking secret about Royal and Angenette's relationship surfaces just as the family heads to the Philippines for their wedding. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Nicole braces herself for Lidia's reaction when her new boyfriend comes to visit.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: Don't Leave Me This Way
programme.desc: Emily reacts to Shekeb ditching her to tend to his mother. Stephanie finds herself struggling to win Liz's acceptance. Jason shares bad news with his mom.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Hilary Duff
programme.desc: Actress Hilary Duff learns of an ancestor who bravely led an American colony into battle against a notorious gang of pirates. She also dives centuries deep into her Scottish roots and is shocked to discover that she descends from a heroic medieval king.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Laverne Cox
programme.desc: Actress and activist Laverne Cox learns about the inspiring life of her African American ancestor, who challenged societal norms and bravely pushed the boundaries just years after Emancipation.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Mo Babies, Mo Problems
programme.desc: The Hodges become a family of eight, as Liz and Daniel finally get to bring home their fifth baby from the hospital.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Quints' First Photo Shoot, Say Cheese!
programme.desc: Liz and Daniel hope to pull off their first family photo shoot with almost five-month-old quints. In the meantime, the family comes together to decorate the nursery for the babies. Due to over-exhaustion, Liz oversleeps and misses a special moment.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Our Piece of Heaven
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Starving for Independence
programme.desc: In order to avoid more tension in the family, Kim allows Moriah to go to San Francisco with Olivia. From the moment they land Moriah quickly realizes she's a long way from south Georgia. Ethan finds creative ways to pass the time while Olivia is gone.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Just Look Cool
programme.desc: Much to Moriah's excitement and disbelief, she and Kim plan out a college tour. Micah tries his hand at modeling but nearly jeopardizes his career before it begins. Ethan, Olivia, Kim and Barry finally sit down to discuss their issues.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: The Big Announcement
programme.desc: Kim takes Moriah on her first college tour. Micah nearly jeopardizes his career as a model before it even begins. Ethan and Olivia plan an outing for the family with some surprises in store including news from Moriah that leaves Kim and Barry shocked.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney Meets the Parents
programme.desc: When Chase takes Whitney home to West Virginia to meet his family, she fears they won't accept her. But the couple fights when he doesn't want her to leave early for Buddy's comedy show. And Chase's sister puts Whitney on the spot about having kids.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Drinking Buddy
programme.desc: Whitney worries for her parents' safety after her dad falls down the stairs. Buddy discovers he must make amends to Whitney for his recovery. Ryan and Chase throw Whitney a party, but Chase is jealous when Whitney leaves to take a call from Buddy.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
