programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: In the Trenches
programme.desc: In the path of raging California wildfires, Marty and Matt devise a plan to create an evacuation route for their livestock and protect their home. Later, Marty takes on a risky build to prevent a Wisconsin homestead from going under.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Animal Uprising
programme.desc: In forgotten locations across the world, animals have become the rulers of humankind's ruins. Discover how Civil War ruins became a haven for alligators and polar bears infiltrated Arctic ghost towns.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: In the Trenches
programme.desc: In the path of raging California wildfires, Marty and Matt devise a plan to create an evacuation route for their livestock and protect their home. Later, Marty takes on a risky build to prevent a Wisconsin homestead from going under.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Animal Uprising
programme.desc: In forgotten locations across the world, animals have become the rulers of humankind's ruins. Discover how Civil War ruins became a haven for alligators and polar bears infiltrated Arctic ghost towns.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Critical Condition
programme.desc: At Animal House, Dee sees a Chihuahua with a life-threatening condition, a vocal Macaw that needs a beak trim and a dangerously ill newborn calf. At home, Dr. Dee and her husband Ken welcome seven fainting goats to the family.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Dr. Terry operates on a dog that was viciously attacked; Dr. Dee helps a lovesick turtle and performs a pregnancy check for a rancher.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Socked in and Stranded
programme.desc: Dr. Dee swaps roles as she takes her own dog to a specialist in Anchorage for eye surgery. There, she reconnects with her step-daughter to check on a barrel racing horse. Meanwhile, a remote clinic takes a turn for the worse for Dr. Terry and Nicole.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Passing the Scalpel
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff performs surgeries with the help of two vet students. A tribe of fainting goats are seen by Dr. Jeff and Hector, while Dr. Amy discovers why a cute and cuddly kitten is teary-eyed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Mission in South Dakota
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team lend a hand at Lakota Reservation in South Dakota. Back at the clinic, Amy debates emergency surgery for a French bulldog who ate his favorite toy, while Susan finds the perfect forever home for a lovable canine called Koda.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Petra's Pigs
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff reveals the cause behind a beloved senior dog's mysterious lump. A cat called Tigger is monitored for unusual eating habits. An owner learns the perils of purchasing her pup online after it becomes sickly, and Petra shows off her guinea pigs.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Jeff and the Jaguar
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Petra train new vets at a wildlife sanctuary in Mexico. While there, they spay an endangered jaguar, and help an injured osprey. At the clinic, a Great Dane comes in with wounds after battling an air conditioner.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Movie: For Colored Girls
programme.desc: The struggles of coloured women are represented through a series of poems.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Big Happy Family

programme.title: Martin: Sophomore Jinx
programme.desc: The honeymoon is definitely over for Martin and Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Working Girls

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Our Wedding Goes to 11 ... 11 ... 11

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Strangest Alien Worlds

programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Internet Casanova
programme.desc: Single mom Jenn Clark thinks she's found the man of her dreams on a dating site, but little does she know Ray Holycross is a sociopath who preys on vulnerable women. When she creates a plan to trap him, she's not sure she'll make it out alive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Remorse
programme.desc: Robin Sowders is brutally beaten in his home in Bloomington, Indiana and later dies from his injuries. When his wife turns up at the police station, the investigation turns on its head. Only a wiretap will eventually reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: 40 Years of Winter
programme.desc: After Christmas shopping, 18-year-old Linda Velzy vanishes into upstate New York's frozen landscape. The primary suspect refuses to talk to detectives, so Linda's father hatches a desperate plan. But temperatures are dropping and time is running out.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Frozen Waters
programme.desc: When a mother and her two young children mysteriously go missing, her family goes to their home only to discover it empty. Then, two local boys nearby also disappear.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: As He Lay Frozen
programme.desc: On a freezing Minnesota night, a ruthless shooting leaves a young police officer fighting for his life by the roadside. As his wife awaits his fate, a heart-stopping manhunt ensues. As the killers escape, officers don't know who they'll strike next.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Widows of Winter
programme.desc: 74-year-old widow Virginia Johannessen is shot dead in her home; then, another widow is murdered on the same street. Is someone targeting widows on Felton Road? As police unravel the truth, they discover they've made a chilling mistake.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Carbone Job
programme.desc: Jesse and Becky Carbone have lived in their house for four years and have hated their kitchen the entire time. These two inexperienced DIYers want to completely gut the space and turn it into the kitchen of their dreams.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Loffswold Job
programme.desc: Andrew and Mandy want to expand their tiny, outdated house by building a stairway to access their unfinished attic. Ultimately, they plan to convert the upstairs into a new master suite but Andy's disorganization sends Mandy into a meltdown.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Wagner Job
programme.desc: Chelsea Wagner and her fiancé, Tony Sallese, just moved into their first home and have decided to replace their old, outdated kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Valinotti Job
programme.desc: Darren and Ellen love everything about their house but the only problem is, it's way too small for their family. So they decide to add a 500 square foot addition to the back of their home.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Parrish Job
programme.desc: Celeste Parrish wants to renovate her outdated master bathroom and has called in her friend Angela to help. These two novice DIYers quickly learn about the ups and downs of renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Myers Job
programme.desc: Bill and Monica Myers love their Kansas City home. The only problem is their outdated 1950s-style kitchen. But when the couple decides to work as a team to renovate their kitchen, they struggle from the beginning to see eye-to-eye.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Law Job
programme.desc: Adam and Natalie Law have spent a lot of time on renovating their kitchen and their backyard, but now it is time for the bathroom. Unfortunately, their renovation quickly goes south as time starts to slip away.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Williams Job
programme.desc: Nigel drove from New Jersey to help cousin Darrielle overhaul her old, outdate kitchen. Darrielle counts on Nigel's DIY experience to get through this gigantic project of making her kitchen more her style.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work. They hope their budget is enough to give them the open floor plan and modern farmhouse look they desire.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mud Men
programme.desc: Matteo Lundgren is taking the art of natural building to a whole new level with his custom-designed Cob houses that blend with the environment surrounding them.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Good Eats: Curious Yet Tasty Avocado Experiments
programme.desc: Although the avocado is best known for its staring roll in guacamole, this multifaceted culinary actor can also take on rolls usually played by eggs, butter, and even shortening.

programme.title: Good Eats: A Pie in Every Pocket
programme.desc: Alton uncovers the past and present of the handy and tasty pocket pie with fillings such as curry mango, chocolate and beef stew, a necessity for our culture on the go.

programme.title: Good Eats: My Pod
programme.desc: The rare vanilla pod grows on an orchid that can only be pollinated one day a year and contains many flavours and aromas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat is Beautiful III: Flounder
programme.desc: Alton fishes, filets and feasts on a selection of flounder dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the most famous foods in this Peruvian city by the sea.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Reno
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Reno, NV, for a food scene that loves to entertain. He embraces Reno's small town pride as he savors homemade meatballs and ravioli, gets a taste of Basque culture and meets some forward-thinking chefs.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Houston
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Houston, TX, one of the most dynamic and underrated food scenes in the United States. He digs into some classic Tex-Mex fare, loads up on the best brisket in town and gets a taste of the city's crave-worthy international cuisines.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seville
programme.desc: Andrew explores the capitol of Andalusian culture, Seville, Spain.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Bon Appetit
programme.desc: Michael McKean is all berets and baguettes as he digs into a few of France's most fantastic feasts. He crosses the pond to see if crepes could nearly kill a king.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: Michael McKean fans the flames of some fiery hot foods. He discovers that flaming-hot vindaloo may have once been far less combustible, wasabi isn't always what it seems and that jerk chicken is good at keeping ghosts away.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wonton Ways

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Take Your Doc to Work Day / Blazer's Bike
programme.desc: Doc spends the day at her Mom's office for 'Take Our Daughters and Sons to Work Day' and meets a toy in need. Doc administers a series of tests and discovers that Star Blazer Zero's helmet is too big and finds him a new one that fits after his crash.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: ARF's Robot Wish / Missing Collar Mission
programme.desc: When ARF wishes that he had a brother, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to help him find a robot sibling. When Bingo and Rolly's collar accidentally gets mailed to Bonnie in Africa, the pugs go on a mission to get them back.

programme.title: Movie: Bixler High Private Eye
programme.desc: A teenage detective must solve the case of his missing father.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Add-a-Dad/ Squirrely Puffs
programme.desc: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up 'a-lot-a-dads' to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Two and a Half Babies/ Dust Busters
programme.desc: Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man. Timmy must get Chet back in order to save the city. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Manic Mom Day/ Crocker of Gold
programme.desc: Timmy wishes the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale; Mom and Dad have a surf-off.

programme.title: It's Pony: Gerry's Birthday/ Haircut
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony try to give Gerry the best birthday ever, their enthusiasm threatens to make it the worst. When Annie needs a haircut, Pony proves that even a simple task can become a wild adventure.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Man's Worst Friend
programme.desc: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy be replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: Movie: Rufus
programme.desc: A lonely, supernatural teenager learns what it means to be human.

programme.title: Movie: Rufus 2
programme.desc: Rufus gets a crush on a new girl at school with a secret, but Manny and Paige become suspicious of her. A mysterious villain seeks out the magic amulet.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Loud House: Dance Dance Resolution/ A Fair to Remember

programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.desc: Mitchell helps the kids build a weather observation station.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: Bubble House/ The Syrup Tree

programme.title: Sesame Street: Game Day on Sesame Street

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Petercadabra/ Sleepless in Pinkville

programme.title: The Trouble With Maggie Cole

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Roadkill
programme.desc: Promoted to justice minister, Peter deals with a prison riot, an angry daughter and alarming contacts from a stranger. Meanwhile, an unknown threat looms abroad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Smoked

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: True Believers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alta Kockers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Missing

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: I'm Going to Make You a Star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: The Darkest Journey Home

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Down Low in Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: A serial predator targeting men in gay bars proves difficult to catch, until a celebrity comes forward with his story.

programme.title: Modern Family: Strangers in the Night
programme.desc: When Alex tells Phil and Claire she has a boyfriend, they worry they’ve put too much pressure on her and has made up an imaginary boyfriend.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Jay goes from feeling disappointed to scared when Gloria's visiting sister, Sonia, becomes a large deterrence for a romantic evening with Gloria. Then, Mitchell and Cameron get themselves in a very precarious situation with their good friend Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rescue
programme.desc: Detective Benson continues her search for Calvin's drug-addicted mother. When her name comes up during a rape investigation, Benson cannot resist getting involved despite being ordered not to.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Pop

programme.title: Movie: The Flight Before Christmas

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Live Life Foward
programme.desc: Creating an unforgettable experience for critically ill children and their families.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: A photographer returns home for Christmas just as the annual holiday light show is resurrected. She volunteers to pitch in, but soon discovers her high-school sweetheart is also helping out.

programme.title: Movie: The Road Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Two rival musicians find themselves working together to road trip to each other’s hometowns for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Mountain Christmas
programme.desc: After being marooned in her Tennessee hometown after a snowstorm, a country music star is pressured to take part in the local Christmas concert.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Oklahoma City Bombing
programme.desc: In 1995, a federal building in Oklahoma City was torn apart by a powerful truck bomb killing 168 people. The man responsible was a decorated war hero who had turned against his own government.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Family Annihilator
programme.desc: After being turned down for a promotion, Brad Bishop used a sledgehammer to brutally murder his wife, his three young sons and his own mother. Although there have been multiple sightings, Brad Bishop has evaded the authorities for over 30 years.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Innocence Defiled
programme.desc: The religious leader of a Hindu community in Texas flees after having been convicted of sexually abusing the children of his followers.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Good Wife
programme.desc: Months after their arranged marriage, a young husband from India allegedly beats his wife to death while the two work an overnight shift in the kitchen of a Maryland donut shop.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Fugitive Mom
programme.desc: A young mother chooses to vanish with her two-year-old daughter and a serial child molester is caught in Texas, but flees his trial and begins his monstrous pattern again.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Justice Denied
programme.desc: Patty and Jerry Wetterling got a phone call in 1989 saying their son had been taken by an unknown abductor. For the past 25 years, new leads have come and gone, but they still await answers in his disappearance. Plus, scammers in Hawaii are on the run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big River Redemption
programme.desc: Mark and Digger struggle to get a special recipe run for a shine legend. Big Chuck attempts to redeem himself after destroying Josh's operation. Chico and Sandra continue work on their still site but disaster strikes on the road to riches.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Time Machine
programme.desc: Tim needs to rescue his operation, challenging the laws of nature and time. Mark and Digger implement a high-tech addition to their operation that could double their output, if it doesn't blow them up. Jeff and Lance make a once banned liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Dog Days of Shining
programme.desc: Josh and Big Chuck attempt to revive their season with a new still site. Mark and Digger are ready to put their still design to the test. Mark and Mike take their first steps grab at a new territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Smokey Mountain Gin
programme.desc: Tim Smith aims to put a whiskey time machine to the test. Chico and Sandra switch gears with a new recipe in hopes of jump starting their stalled season. Mark and Digger opt to experiment with distilling an old classic on their high-speed rig.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Green Dragon
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck aim to get back on top but circumstances could leave them dead to law. Money threatens to destroy an age-old partnership for Jeff, Mark and Lance. Mark and Digger painstakingly craft a special brew for a high rolling customer.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big City Bootleg
programme.desc: Josh and Big Chuck go underground to build a new stash site. Mark and Digger venture out of the Smokeys and into the big city for the biggest sale of their careers. Patti and David follow nature's harvest to make a sweet new brew.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Big Wheels Keep on Turning
programme.desc: Mark and Digger bring in a moonshine legend to rev up production. Josh and Chuck turn to an old power source to prolong their operation. Chico and Sondra gear up for their first big sale of the season.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Green Devil
programme.desc: Jeff and Lance attempt to salvage their absinthe recipe. Mark puts his new partner to the test. Backbreaking labour and a lack of profit threaten to leave Josh up the creek without a paddle or a partner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Thunder Pumpkins
programme.desc: An ingredient has Josh and Chuck ready to quit the biz. Mark and Digger band together with JB to run their signature spirit, but a mishap could send them running. Tim puts his turbo-aged whiskey to the test.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Two Pot Bang Bang
programme.desc: Josh and Chuck struggle to finish winterizing their site. Mark and Digger bring their two-pot still out of retirement. While Mark and Mike have enjoyed a string of successful runs, delivering the goods could land them in the crosshairs of the law.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Intruder Alert
programme.desc: Mark and Digger clash with the law. A breach from an intruder leaves Josh and Chuck deep in debt. Chico and Sondra's operation is burned.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Call
programme.desc: Winter hot on their heels, shiners aim to cash in. A legendary partnership comes to a bittersweet end as Jeff, Mark and Lance head their separate ways. Tim gets to spend time with and old friend. Patti and David end their season with a boatload of shine.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mystery in Mammoth Cave
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot investigate a strange phenomenon that's been haunting Mammoth Cave for generations.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mt. Adams' UFO Encounter
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot follow headlines of hidden hangars and strange orbs of light into an active volcano in Washington.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Expedition X: The Amazon's Cursed Ruins
programme.desc: Expedition X explores an abandoned and haunted outpost in the Amazon rainforest. After meeting with tribes deep in the jungle, they hear strange things at night that cause panic.

programme.title: Expedition X: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica head to Lake Lanier, the deadliest lake in America, to uncover rumors of drownings and ghostly encounters.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Chasing the Fortune of Sir Francis Drake
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches land and sea for the lost fortune of legendary pirate, Sir Francis Drake. Joining treasure hunters and maritime archaeologists, Josh hunts for a lost cache of Spanish gold and the remains of Drake himself.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Super Heavyweight Ladies
programme.desc: Whitney trains for the State Championships with a new weightlifting coach. Then, she has some special words to share with Chase.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Amends Between Friends
programme.desc: Ryan surprises Whitney with a hefty business proposition and she is forced to get on board or miss the opportunity of a lifetime. Meanwhile, Buddy sits Whitney down to make amends.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: When Whitney and Todd hatch an exciting new business plan, Ryan's negative reaction threatens to derail not only their upcoming trip to Paris but also Whitney's performance at the North Carolina State Weightlifting Championships.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Fat Girl in Paris
programme.desc: The trip to Paris is underway and expectations are high, but Whitney worries when she and Ryan clash over their opposing business plans. Meanwhile, Whitney finally warms up to talk to Chase about their future, but his reaction leaves her cold.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life
programme.desc: Whitney's love affair with Paris continues, but her relationship with Chase is on the rocks. And Ryan challenges Whitney to a brutal climb up the Eiffel Tower, but the biggest surprise of her life waits at the top.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Wedding Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: Now four months into their engagement, Whitney and Chase are no closer to living together, but wedding plans need to be made. During a mountain getaway, Whitney and Buddy test their new boundaries.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Our Piece of Heaven
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life
programme.desc: Whitney's love affair with Paris continues, but her relationship with Chase is on the rocks. And Ryan challenges Whitney to a brutal climb up the Eiffel Tower, but the biggest surprise of her life waits at the top.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Wedding Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: Now four months into their engagement, Whitney and Chase are no closer to living together, but wedding plans need to be made. During a mountain getaway, Whitney and Buddy test their new boundaries.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Our Piece of Heaven
programme.desc: The nine flaxen-haired children in the Plath family have never had a soda, don't know who Spiderman or Tom Brady is and have never watched TV, living remotely in rural Georgia with their 'follow their own rules' parents Kim and Barry Plath.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Jean Smart
programme.desc: Actress Jean Smart uncovers the curious tale of an unconventional ancestor in colonial Massachusetts, who got her children entangled in her own thievery ring. Later, she faced execution when she was accused of witchcraft.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Megan Mullally
programme.desc: Megan Mullally delves into a shocking pattern of dysfunction in her father's line. She discovers that her two times great-grandmother defied societal norms to fight for her family's survival, all the while struggling to hang on to her own sanity.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: Adventures in Toddler Potty Training
programme.desc: Liz and Daniel try to potty train Rowan while keeping up with the needs of the quints. Daniel's brothers surprise Liz and Rowan with a playground for their backyard. As Connell struggles to gain weight, Liz and Daniel worry he may require a risky surgery.

programme.title: Hodges Half Dozen: The Quints' First Halloween
programme.desc: The Hodges get ready for their first Halloween with their half dozen kids, including matching costumes for the quints. Later, Liz and Daniel are shocked to learn that Nolan, Connell, Liam and Dillon have medical conditions that may require surgeries.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: His Opinion...
programme.desc: Taylor brought her fiancé to help her find her dream gown. Brandi shops with her fiancé because she needs his approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Budget Brides
programme.desc: Monisha has come looking for a dress for her three wedding ceremonies. Mary has a budget of thirty thousand dollars to buy two dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Day of Challenges
programme.desc: Stefania wants a simple, classic gown, but her family has grander ideas. Precious just had weight loss surgery and needs a gown to fit her shrinking frame. Cheryl’s wedding is in 72 days and she needs a dress to fit her thick frame and tall height.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Day, Mom's Way
programme.desc: Dina is 50 and fabulous and is looking for a dress as sassy as she is. Laura wants a simple lace dress but is having trouble pleasing her young entourage. Shandel wants to look glamorous in a fitted dress but her daughter, Paige, doesn't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: There's No 'I' in Groom
programme.desc: Samantha brings her fiancé dress shopping against her mom's wishes. Kelsey asks her best friend to help her pick a wedding dress but their visions don't agree.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eye of the Bridal Storm
programme.desc: Legally blind bride Jessi argues with her overbearing mom about finding an age-appropriate dress. Passive bride Karen must make her voice heard above her opinionated pro-wrestler fiancé's. Bride Lindsay is exhausted after shopping with 13 bridesmaids.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Dress Against All Odds
programme.desc: After an accident, Katie is determined to walk down the aisle in her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Whose Wedding Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Elizabeth hopes her fitting will be a lasting memory for her mom who is unable to attend her wedding.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Three Apartments, Three Hoarders
programme.desc: An apartment complex has not one, not two, but three extreme hoarders. For years their hoarding has gone unchecked but with building now under strict management, everything is about to change.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I'm a Rockstar, Baby!
programme.desc: As the lead singer of one of Canada's most famous rock bands, Kelly Jay has lived quite a life and he has collected a massive hoard to prove it.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Battle With Chaos
programme.desc: If they don't change their extreme hoarding, Jeff might lose the children he adores and Debbie may never have children at all.

programme.title: Movie: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Two long-time best girlfriends are getting married. They wind up scheduling their weddings on the same day and their plans turn into a competition with each other. The friendship becomes a bitter rivalry over their dream weddings.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Do Something
programme.desc: The new coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. Kailyn opens up about her pregnancy.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant: Kash
programme.desc: Kash has been with her boyfriend Nate for about a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious with her.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Florida Georgia Line
programme.desc: Country superstars Florida Georgia Line join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to help deal with some "Bad Tree Vibez," take their pickup trucks on a "Bruise Cruise," and celebrate the dimwitted in" It's Simple."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nev Schulman

programme.title: Storage Wars: High Stakes and Low Blows
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, home to some of the biggest finds and worst dramas. Ivy has never hit it big here so he is focused on a good score no matter the cost. Meanwhile, Jarrod and Brandi are determined to not let another big locker get away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Valley of the Hauls
programme.desc: Moreno Valley, California, is a bit out of the way, but any auction could have the hidden treasure that keeps the buyers on the hunt. Mary decides it is time to take matters into her own hands and launches a daring idea, while Ivy keeps it old school.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Like It Hotter
programme.desc: A few locals give Rene a run for his money, but that doesn't stop Mary from bidding beyond her budget.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock the Vote!
programme.desc: Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker while Jarrod and Brandi have good history in the area and hope for another score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Bid and No Bite
programme.desc: The day starts rough, but nothing can stop the hunt for treasure as the buyers head to Rancho Palos Verdes, CA. Mary has to stay on a budget and learns a hard lesson about Dave. Rene tries a secret strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Just Deserts
programme.desc: Ivy uses a dastardly tactic to rouse the competition as the auction forces Mary to travel well out of her comfort zone. Rene steps up his game, while Darrell tries to score despite Brandon's sour mood.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auctions and Allies
programme.desc: The buyers return to Koreatown for an auction near the heart of Los Angeles. In order to score a good locker, Brandi is forced to keep an eye out for more shenanigans from Jarrod. Ivy and Mary form an unexpected alliance.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Downtown Lockers and Uptown Dreams
programme.desc: An auction challenges the buyers to find a score in a tower of lockers in downtown Los Angeles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The School of Hard Knock-Knocks
programme.desc: Auctions in the college town of Rancho Dominguez have the buyers on the hunt for hip lockers with big scores. Darrell and Brandon are looking for quantity to feed their store, while Rene is targeting quality.

programme.title: Storage Wars: There's No Business Like Snow Business
programme.desc: Mary weathers the storm with gusto as Casey tries to keep Rene's eyes on the prize. Ivy doesn't let the cold weather freeze him out and goes on a buying spree, while Dave tries to heat things up.

programme.title: Storage Wars: From Dust 'Til Dawn
programme.desc: The desert country of Mojave, California, hosts a rough auction where the buyers have to dig deep to find value.

programme.title: Storage Wars: An Auction Too Far
programme.desc: A tough start in Santa Ana leads to a long day, as the buyers hit a second auction in Hawaiian Gardens, in hopes of finding a great locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mo' Money, Mo' Valley
programme.desc: Lockers go for big bucks as the buyers hit auctions in Moreno Valley, California. Ivy and Dave duke it out for a pair of units while Mary tries to avoid the shrapnel. One buyer hits it big with a twice-in-a-lifetime find that provides over $10K in profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock, Stock and One Smoking Darrell
programme.desc: Brandi surprises Jarrod with a thick bankroll in hopes of getting the best unit, while Mary brings in extra help for the huge lockers. Darrell and Brandon win an auction that contains something that unexpectedly lands them in a courtroom.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Rene Abides
programme.desc: Darrell tries to teach Brandon one of the toughest lessons in the storage locker game. Mary challenges Rene to a bet that has more than money at stake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Palm Springs Throwdown
programme.desc: The buyers head to Palm Springs, where more than the prices get hot under the desert sun. Ivy brings his game with his sights set on a high-roller locker, while Rene tries to play it cool despite the high temperatures.

programme.desc: Frank Lucas, the notorious heroin kingpin who dominated the Harlem market.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.desc: Jackson works with a soft-spoken musician who feels abused by her cat and ashamed that she can't figure out how to stop it; a pair of hairless Donskoy cats who are treating their guardian, Debbi's, apartment like it's a 24-hour free-for-all party zone.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Crazy Cat Opens Doors

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sister Smackdown
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her. The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown's show gets cancelled, Bart and Lisa enlist the help of Krusty's Hollywood pals like Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler, Elizabeth Taylor and the Red Hot Chili Peppers to save the show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to College
programme.desc: Homer fails a competency test and must go back to college to keep his job. At college, he selects the nerds and the crusty Dean as his mortal enemies based on his preconceived notions of what college is like from old 1980s films.

programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Handyman Can
