programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Howling
programme.desc: Meet a hard-working couple whose French bulldog's bad behavior has caused them to miss business trips and ultimately lose out on work. Fondue recently failed a doggy day care entrance exam and now the couple has no one to watch him while they are away.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: French Bulldog Revolution
programme.desc: An adopted miniature schnauzer spins compulsively, four French bulldogs revolt against their owner, and a badly abused Lab/chow/shepherd mix needs help accepting love.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Motor Mouth
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Diva's Miracle Worker
programme.desc: Nasir, a 150-lb. South African boerboel, guards the home of legendary recording artist and 2-time Grammy winner Patti LaBelle. Fearing his aggression could lead to an attack, Patti has actually contemplated having him put down.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs
programme.desc: It's the age-old rivalry of mail carriers vs. dogs. Now, Cesar makes a special delivery to the local Post Office in Roswell, Georgia to give some tips to the city's postal workers on encountering aggressive dogs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Red, White and Moo
programme.desc: Before enjoying the fourth of July, Dr. Pol must take care of the animals. Brenda prescribes anti-anxiety medication to a puppy so she can get through the fireworks and Dr. Pol tries to help a very sick dog in distress.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Rise of the Red Planet
programme.desc: The latest science reveals what it would take to build colonies on Mars, and how our future on the Red Planet might be closer than we think.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Universe's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: A new breed of explorers is risking their careers, and even their lives, to lead humanity to worlds we have never seen. From the beginning of our Solar System to the evolution of the Universe, these heroes are tackling the mysteries of life itself.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Fireball From Hell
programme.desc: When a series of accidental explosions erupt at a chemical factory, they completely destroy the area nearby, and now, new discoveries the real reasons behind the deadly chemical fireball that left a giant crater where there was once a building.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Cruise Ship Catastrophe
programme.desc: When a cruise ship meets disaster, the ship begins to sink and the captain flees, leaving 300 passengers stranded; now, new discoveries reveal the fatal truth behind the devastating wreck that claimed 32 lives.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: When Katrina Struck
programme.desc: Hurricane Katrina is one of the worst natural disasters to ever strike American soil, but as the storm revealed widespread construction failures, it's a tragedy of engineering, too; the latest science reveals how.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Crash of the Concorde
programme.desc: The Concorde was the supersonic passenger plane that could fly from New York to London in under four hours, but after a fatal accident kills 100, experts reveal a secret history of the iconic aircraft that led to this devastating explosion.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Nightmare in Hell Valley
programme.desc: After torrential rainfall triggers a catastrophic landslide, a small village in the valley below is devastated, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the engineering that led to this fatal disaster.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Last Party
programme.desc: A wild party ends in terror as a bright, young mom's cries for help fall on deaf ears. When detectives retrace her final steps they find a trap with no way out.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Homicide City: Winter's Bones
programme.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programme.title: Twisted: Murder Mates
programme.desc: In 1984, a killer couple goes on a brutal killing spree throughout the Midwest. After claiming the lives of 8 victims, the pair must decide if they'll keep killing or surrender to the police. Their mindless violence leaves the region shocked and appalled.

programme.title: Twisted: The Killer Next Door
programme.desc: The Bike Path Rapist terrorized the city of Buffalo for three decades. One part Mr. Normal, and one part Homicidal Maniac, no one knows he's living the life of a beloved pillar of the community.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Lust for Death
programme.desc: Ron Hiiri is a charming ladies' man, living the good life in upscale Connecticut. But along with the presence of an alluring new girlfriend and a mysterious stockbroker, comes a mix of financial and romantic entanglements that proves to be deadly.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Brother vs. Brother
programme.desc: Two brothers run a lucrative snow removal business. But one of them grows devoted to a spiritual group and its enigmatic guru; while the other finds a more illicit path to enlightenment. The only thing that can stop this family feud is murder.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Right-Hand Con-Man
programme.desc: Denver's real estate market is on fire. So when Wall Street veteran Ken Germain promises big bucks everyone jumps aboard, including his right-hand man Colin Collea. But when the dream turns to dust, a raging mob of those betrayed, scream bloody murder.

programme.title: The Missing: Disappearances in Santa Monica Mountains
programme.desc: Elaine Park spends the night away from home in Santa Monica and is never seen again. Later, Matthew Weaver Jr. takes a late night drive and goes missing. Elaine and Matthew's vehicles have both been found in the Santa Monica Mountains.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Mothers
programme.desc: Prisma Reyes vanishes from a parking garage after footage shows her getting on an elevator, but is never seen again. And then Andrea Knabel disappears during the middle of the night.

programme.title: The Missing: Never Came Back
programme.desc: Tyler Davis goes out and is seen on surveillance walking across a hotel parking lot. Police ping his phone, but can't locate him. Later, Kristal Reisinger seeks spiritual enlightenment, but vanishes after heading to a drum circle.

programme.title: The Missing: Off the Face of the Earth
programme.desc: 13-year-old Tabitha Tudors walks to her bus stop, but one day she doesn't come home. She never made it on the bus and police can't find her. And then 16-year-old Shemika Cosey vanishes while at a sleepover.

programme.title: Disappeared: Walk Into Darkness
programme.desc: Tammy Kingery disappears after leaving work sick. Her family finds a note saying she's gone for a walk from their home in the woods, but searches yield no signs. An investigation reveals secrets that lead to dark theories about the mother of three.

programme.title: Disappeared: So Close to Home
programme.desc: Ali Lowizter vanishes after getting off the school bus. The investigation stalls for two years until a tip comes in claiming Ali could have been trafficked.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Fear and Loathing in Houston
programme.desc: In April 2008, 39-year-old Houston native and mother of five, Tina DaVilla, runs errands with her 4 month old infant when she's attacked in a parking lot. In the next year, a rash of similar crimes breaks out across the city. Are they related?

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Murder or Suicide?
programme.desc: A 26-year-old is found shot to death inside her home. The medical examiner declares it a suicide, but a determined investigator takes another look after two different people close to the victim have a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Single Mom Missing
programme.desc: 31-year-old mother of two Michelle Warner vanishes without a trace from her apartment in Houston that she shares with her ex. With no concrete proof of anything untoward, police are left with a hunch that her checkered past has reared its ugly head.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Hometown Touch
programme.desc: Bug and the team are tasked with reclaiming materials from a historic vineyard that can turn a huge profit if they make it out unscathed.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Teacherage
programme.desc: The team head to Henderson, NC, to salvage parts from an old home that used to house young female teachers. They salvage an attic ladder, doors, archways, and columns as well as the home's fire escape.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Price Fuller Machine Shop
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, Grayson and Tay head to the Machine Shop they bought to see what they can find. The team finds items for new builds. As they're renovating the house on their property, they find many new builds are needed. Mike and Tay make a coffee bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To The Ferry
programme.desc: The team returns to the Norfolk, VA, ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peacock Salem Cleaners
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Salem, VA to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. The 100-year-old building is filled with antique laundromat parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Twin Capes Ferry
programme.desc: The crew heads to Norfolk, VA, to test their sea legs and salvage an obsolete ferry including lights, skylights and a mural. Back at the shop, Grayson helps Mike and Tay with a commissioned build for a fellow maker.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man 2017 winner Eddie Hall gets roped into a strength test with legendary boxing coach Buster Custus at a famed Philadelphia gym before he gets a double hit of delicious Philly cheesesteak.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Brooklyn
programme.desc: World's Strongest Man winner, Eddie Hall hits Brooklyn to take on a huge Mac and Cheese eating challenge, sample NYC's best cheesecake and bend metal with a Coney Island strongman.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All Greek to Me
programme.desc: It's a burger gift from the Greek gods. Michael Symon's Greek heritage is on full display as he makes a grilled Lamb Burger with Tzatziki. His wife, Liz, concocts an Ouzo Spritz with pickled watermelon rind that pairs perfectly with Michael's burger.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pasta, Tacos and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts his search for great bites on wheels in Venice Beach, Calif., at the Prince of Venice, a food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burgers, Pizza and Waffles
programme.desc: Brad Miller is hunting down must-eat food truck fare, and he starts in South Central Los Angeles at Billionaire Burger Boys. They make the classic pairing of burger and fries bigger, better and bolder.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Filling Up In Florida
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts the day strong with a Chopped champion's hearty French crepe with an American twist and then keeps things rolling at a Brooklyn-style deli.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hungry In The Jax
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Jacksonville, Fla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He kicks off his culinary escapades with a chef-driven dish of chorizo corn cakes with vegan queso and spicy guajillo chile sauce.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sweet Deals Down South
programme.desc: Ali Khan has only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Savannah, Ga., for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Queen City Cravings
programme.desc: Ali Khan is out to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Charlotte, N.C. Good things take time, so Ali starts his day with the sweet and satisfying "slowberry" cobbler waffle.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Tokyo
programme.desc: Anthony seeks to find the connection between knives and good sushi as he visits scenic Tokyo.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off a full day of Thanksgiving eats, including homemade pies and irresistible sides. And don't forget the turkey! These top picks for the big day will leave you feeling ready to feast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.
